description:
Introduction to Aluminium Water Tank

NewTech Steels comes to you with innovative designs for water storage: premium Aluminium Water Tanks crafted to meet international standards. These tanks are distinct regarding their performance, durability, and cleanliness for the present-day household, commercial, and industrial settings.

Aluminium offers a safe and hard-wearing substitute to store drinking water and other kinds of liquids as it has anti-corrosive and non-reactive properties. Our tanks prove beyond doubt to be the best reliable option, be it for domestic use or for massive industrial needs.

Why Choose Aluminium Water Tanks from NewTech Steels?

Aluminium Water Tanks give you multiple advantages over conventional storage. They won't rust away like steel tanks or degrade like plastic tanks. As a natural corrosion-resistant material, aluminium has no rust build-up to contaminate the water, hence ensuring clean storage.

Light yet strong enough to withstand the weather, you can load and install aluminium tanks without much concern. With its inner surface smooth and free from pitting, the manufacture of these tanks inhibits conditions favorable to bacterial growth, therefore ensuring sanitary water storage. One hundred percent recyclable — a great asset for all environmentally conscious consumers.

NewTech Steels offers various modalities of size and bespoke manufacturing arrangements to match every customer's need.
specifications:
MaterialHigh-grade Aluminium
StandardsIS15961:2012, ISO 9364
ApplicationsPotable water, Raw water, RO water
pH Range3 to 12
Suitable ForResidential, Commercial, Industrial
Corrosion ResistanceYes – naturally corrosion-resistant, rust-free
Recyclability100% recyclable
Inner SurfaceSmooth, non-pitting – inhibits bacterial growth
CustomisationAvailable in various sizes; bespoke manufacturing options
ManufacturerNewTech Steels Industries Pvt. Ltd., Ghaziabad, U.P.

description:
Introduction to DM Water Tank

NewTech Steels manufactures DM Water Tanks — robust and reliable solutions for demineralized water storage applications. DM water is required in industries demanding high-purity water, free from dissolved minerals and salts, which include pharmaceuticals, power generation, laboratories, and electronics manufacturing.

Corrosion-resistant materials are employed for the construction of the tanks to ensure purity, safety, and longevity. Every DM Water Tank is built with the understanding that the chemical integrity of water has to be retained without any contamination.

Why Choose a DM Water Tank from NewTech Steels?

Quality and precision deliver guaranteed long-lasting performance in NewTech Steels DM Water Tanks. Our tanks are manufactured either with specially coated steels or from non-reactive liners to eliminate any leaching of minerals and protect stored water from chemical reactions.

Our tanks are leak-proof and easy to maintain, as well as custom designed according to specific capacity and layout requirements. They perfectly integrate into complex industrial systems, providing a solution for process-critical water storage requirements.
specifications:
MaterialZinc Aluminium Alloy / Specially Coated Steel
ApplicationDemineralized Water Storage
IndustriesPharmaceutical, Power Plants, Textile, Electronics
StandardsASTM A792M, IS15961:2012
Inner LiningNon-reactive liner to prevent mineral leaching
Leak ProofYes – tested for zero leakage

description:
Introduction to Galvanised Steel Water Tank

NewTech Steels is proud to provide Galvanised Steel Water Tanks that are guaranteed to far exceed known standards in durability, hygiene, and long-term performance. Galvanised steel is protected against rust and corrosion by zinc coatings, which commend the metal for long-standing water retention in all kinds of environments.

Galvanised tanks may be relied on for absolute strength and unmatched quality in any given environment — whether household, commercial, or industrial.

Why Choose a Galvanised Steel Water Tank?

Galvanised Steel Water Tanks from NewTech Steels are well-engineered and apt to weather all extremes of pressure and environment. Galvanised tanks do not go out of shape, are not cracked, and compared with plastic or concrete, resist UV radiation effectively.

The zinc coating increases the life of the tank and ensures that the water is safe and clean for drinking. The tanks are easy to install and require minimal maintenance. Many shapes and sizes can be customised for individual needs. Our environmentally friendly materials and sleek modern design make these tanks a wise choice for sustainable water management.
specifications:

description:
The Critical Role of Industrial Fire Water Tanks

Fire safety is more than a requirement in industry — it is simply a necessity. NewTech Steels designs and produces Industrial Fire Water Tanks for emergency cases, regulatory compliance, and long-term durability.

Industrial Fire Water Tanks are purpose-built storage units for water to be used in fire suppression systems, including sprinklers, hydrants, and foam systems. Any type of facility — manufacturing plant, warehouse, refinery, power plant, or logistics hub — counts on these tanks to be reliable in case of need, standing between minor damage and catastrophic loss.

Why Fire Water Storage Matters in Industries

Fire accidents create havoc in infrastructure, lives, and operations. It is never safe or adequate to depend entirely on the municipal water supply in high-risk industrial zones, which is why most safety codes including NFPA, FM Global, and BIS have made it mandatory to provide on-site water storage.

A NewTech Steels industrial fire water tank ensures safety, compliance, and operational resilience. Our tanks are built to provide protection for today and tomorrow.
specifications:

ComplianceNFPA, FM Global, BIS Fire Safety Standards

Suppression SystemsSprinklers, Hydrants, Foam Systems
CustomisationCustom capacity, layout and fittings available
ManufacturerNewTech Steels Industries Pvt. Ltd., Ghaziabad, U.P.

description:
Leading Industrial Over Head Tank Manufacturer

NewTech Steels proudly manufactures reliable Industrial Over Head Tanks in India, bringing forth rugged and well-performing storage solutions for industrial applications. With years of experience and innovations in steel fabrication, we manufacture overhead tanks that have passed all tests of quality, safety, and reliability.

Built for industrial situations requiring large water, chemical, and fluid storage, our industrial overhead tanks are built from heavy-duty materials with assurance of resistance to corrosion, extreme temperatures, and heavy-duty use. Our knowledge and importance placed on precision and structural strength are reflected through every stage of production.

Why Choose Our Industrial Over Head Tank?

When NewTech Steels is selected for an industrial overhead tank, it is an investment in quality. Our tanks are state-of-the-art and custom made to fit your volume and site-specific requirements. Every tank manufactured has gone through stringent quality controls where performance, life, and safety tests are conducted.

All steel coming into our facilities is certified and meets all industrial and environmental compliance standards. Our overhead tanks can withstand high static and dynamic loads in an industrial environment. We provide complete support from design consultation to site assessment, installation, and maintenance assistance.

description:
Premium Overhead Water Tank Solutions

Providing safe storage is one of the most critical needs in urban and industrial settings. Overhead water tanks are a very practical solution, storing water and supplying it by gravity — suitable for residential buildings, commercial buildings, industries, and public infrastructure. NewTech Steels Industries Private Limited provides tanks of the highest quality that truly stand the test of time.

What is an Overhead Water Tank?

An overhead water tank is placed at a height — usually on a rooftop or on a steel or concrete support structure. Water is stored and supplied by gravity to various points of use without the need for pumping every time. These tanks help maintain constant water pressure and continuous water supply for daily use.

Why Choose NewTech Steels' Overhead Water Tank?

  • Durable Construction: Built using high-strength materials including stainless steel, mild steel, or coated steel with anti-corrosion layer — designed to withstand high pressure and harsh weather.
  • Hygienic Water Storage: Internal coating prevents algae and bacterial growth, ensuring clean and safe water for drinking, cooking, and cleaning.
  • Leak-Proof and Maintenance-Free: Tested for leakproof and long-life performance, resistant to cracking, rusting, or structural damage.
  • Wide Range of Capacities: From 500 litres to several thousand litres, customised to suit residential, commercial, and industrial projects.

Applications include domestic water supply systems, industrial processing, fire protection systems, public infrastructure, and agricultural irrigation.
specifications:
MaterialZinc Aluminium / Stainless Steel / Mild Steel
StandardsAustralian AS 1397:2002, IS15961:2012
ApplicationsResidential, Commercial, Industrial, Agricultural
InstallationRoof / Elevated Platform / Steel Structure
Capacity Range500 litres to several thousand litres
Inner CoatingAnti-algae, anti-bacterial coating
Leak-ProofYes – series tested for zero leakage
ManufacturerNewTech Steels Industries Pvt. Ltd., Ghaziabad, U.P.

description:
Strong Underground Water Storage Tank for Industrial Use

Water is one of the most necessary resources in residential, commercial, industrial, and agricultural activities. Having it in a safe and efficient storage method is important to its quality and availability. A good Underground Water Storage Tank is essential where space is limited or climate conditions do not allow overhead tanks.

At NewTech Steels Industries Private Limited, we design, produce and install superior Underground Water Storage Tank systems suited to the requirements of current infrastructure. We use high-quality materials to manufacture tanks of superior strength that are corrosion-free and offer extended service life.

Key Advantages of Underground Water Storage Tanks

  • Space-Saving Design: Installed fully underground — does not take up any usable surface area, ideal for urban and space-limited facilities.
  • Improved Water Temperature Control: Burial placement maintains water at a constant temperature, slowing bacterial growth and enhancing quality.
  • Better Aesthetics: Does not disrupt the appearance of a structure or landscape.
  • Long-Term Durability: Designed using robust materials resistant to soil pressure, corrosion, and environmental stresses.
  • Safe and Hygienic: Underground installation prevents direct sunlight exposure and external contamination.
  • Excellent for Rainwater Harvesting: High capacity storage for collected rainwater for various uses.
  • Fire Safety Applications: Used as emergency fire water reserve tanks by industries.
specifications:
Installation TypeUnderground / Subterranean
MaterialZinc Aluminium / Galvanised Steel / Reinforced Steel
WaterproofingBuilt-in protective anti-corrosion coating
ApplicationsRainwater harvesting, Potable water, Fire water, Industrial process
Load BearingHigh load bearing capacity, soil pressure resistant
Temperature ControlNatural temperature regulation from burial
AccessModular design with inspection openings for maintenance
ManufacturerNewTech Steels Industries Pvt. Ltd., Ghaziabad, U.P.

description:
Zinc Aluminium Storage Tanks

Zinc Aluminium Storage Tanks have emerged as a reliable solution for industrial, agricultural, and commercial storage needs. These tanks combine the strength of steel with superior corrosion resistance, making them ideal for long-term liquid and dry storage. Their exceptional properties make them suitable for storing water, chemicals, petroleum, and various industrial fluids.

What Are Zinc Aluminium Storage Tanks?

Zinc Aluminium Storage Tanks are constructed using an alloy of zinc, aluminium, and silicon. This unique composition — 55% Aluminium, 43.5% Zinc, and 1.5% Silicon — offers excellent corrosion resistance, lightweight properties, and high structural integrity. The combination of these metals enhances durability and ensures that the tank can withstand extreme environmental conditions.

Key Advantages

  • 4x Better Corrosion Resistance: Significantly superior to traditional hot-dip galvanised tanks.
  • 25+ Year Life Expectancy: Long-lasting investment that reduces lifecycle costs.
  • Meets International Standards: Compliant with Australian AS 1397:2002 and American ASTM A792M.
  • Suitable for Water, Chemicals & Industrial Fluids: Versatile across industries.
  • Eco-Friendly: 100% recyclable material with sustainable manufacturing practices.

Zinc Aluminium tanks stand out as a superior storage solution with their advanced material composition, structural integrity, and versatile applications, making them an excellent investment for businesses and industries looking for a reliable, long-term storage solution.
specifications:
Alloy Composition55% Aluminium, 43.5% Zinc, 1.5% Silicon
StandardsAustralian AS 1397:2002, ASTM A792M, IS15961:2012
Corrosion Resistance4x better than traditional galvanised steel
Life Expectancy25+ years
Storage ApplicationsWater, Chemicals, Petroleum, Industrial Fluids
Industries ServedIndustrial, Agricultural, Commercial, Municipal
Recyclability100% recyclable
ManufacturerNewTech Steels Industries Pvt. Ltd., Ghaziabad, U.P.

description:
GI Bolted Liquid Storage Tanks

In the realm of industrial solutions, the significance of efficient and reliable liquid storage cannot be overstated. As a pioneering force in the steel fabrication industry, NewTech Steels stands as a distinguished liquid storage tanks manufacturer, committed to providing top-tier solutions for diverse storage needs.

With over 8 years of industry expertise, we bring a wealth of knowledge to the forefront, ensuring precision engineering and unmatched reliability in every GI bolted storage tank we produce.

Benefits of Our GI Bolted Tanks

  • Corrosion Resistance: Crafted from galvanized steel, providing robust resistance to corrosion and ensuring long-lasting durability.
  • Customisation Options: Flexible range of designs and capacities tailored to specific storage needs.
  • Easy Installation: Properly positioned with connected inlet and outlet pipes and secured fittings.
  • Versatility in Applications: Suitable for agriculture, chemical processing, wastewater management, and more.
  • Durability: Top-quality materials and advanced construction techniques guarantee longevity and reliability.

PVC Liners

Our PVC Food Grade Liners are prefabricated as one bag or bladder to fit inside the storage tank. Liners guarantee zero leakage of liquid and no direct contact between the stored liquid and the steel wall, restricting corrosion and contamination. Fabricated from high tensile PVC, TPU or EPDM fabrics with food grade, anti-algae, anti-static and anti-cracking properties. Tested at 2 kg/cm² for any leaks.

description:
ETP & STP Storage Tanks

Effluent Treatment Plants (ETPs) and Sewage Treatment Plants (STPs) stand as the guardians of environmental compliance, preserving the delicate balance of our ecosystem. ETPs manage industrial wastewater, guaranteeing the safe release of treated water into the environment. Meanwhile, STPs oversee domestic wastewater and sewage, purifying it before discharge.

Welcome to NewTech Steels — your trusted ally for cutting-edge ETP and STP storage tanks in Delhi and across India.

Types of ETP STP Storage Tanks

  • Stainless Steel Tanks: Famed for their corrosion resistance, preferred for ETPs and STPs where purity of treated water is critical.
  • Carbon Steel Tanks: Combining durability and cost-effectiveness, well-suited for various industrial wastewater treatment processes.
  • FRP (Fiberglass Reinforced Plastic) Tanks: Lightweight and corrosion-resistant, excellent choice for challenging ETP and STP environments.

Key Features

  • Exceptional Durability: Top-tier materials and advanced manufacturing to withstand demanding industrial conditions.
  • Customisation: Size, shape, and accessories tailored to your specific requirements.
  • Compliance and Certification: Tanks conform to industry standards and CPCB / pollution control regulatory requirements.
  • Corrosion Resistance: Stainless steel and FRP tanks resist the corrosive effects of industrial wastewater.
  • Easy Maintenance: Designed for ease of cleaning and prolonged service life.
specifications:
ApplicationETP, STP, WTP (Effluent / Sewage / Water Treatment)
Tank TypesStainless Steel, Carbon Steel, FRP

description:
Introduction to Zinc Aluminium Water Tank

At NewTech Steels, we showcase all-encompassing and fine quality water storage solutions. Our Zinc Aluminium Water Tanks are designed with strength, longevity, and protection against rusting and corrosion. With an equal blend of the natural strength of aluminium and the compensational properties of zinc, we make water tanks that withstand the test of time.

These tanks are built bearing in mind the modern demands of the household as well as the industry — where a reliable and safe medium is made available to store water for domestic and commercial use.

Why Choose Zinc Aluminium Water Tanks?

Several factors contribute to the superiority of our Zinc Aluminium Water Tanks. Their strength stems from zinc's anti-corrosive properties and the tanks' resistance to wear and tear in unfavourable climates. This means they provide a much longer life span than conventional water tanks, making a budget-friendly solution for years to come.

The tanks resist corrosion, have high compressive strength and structural integrity, which reduces chances of cracking or damage. The aluminium content keeps the quality of the water by restricting the growth of algae and bacteria, ensuring clean, fresh water every time.

NewTech Steels recognises that safe, reliable, and environmentally friendly water storage is paramount. That is why our Zinc Aluminium Water Tanks are manufactured under the highest industrial standards.

description:
Grain Storage Silos Manufacturer — Hopper Bottom Silos

NewTech Steels takes pride in offering cutting-edge silo storage tanks that cater to both short-term and long-term storage needs. Our state-of-the-art silos serve as secure repositories for various materials, including grains, oilseeds, and other free-flowing substances.

Hopper Bottom Silos

Hopper silos serve as versatile storage units suitable for housing seeds or providing temporary storage for wet grain within grain drying plants. Additionally, they find application as buffer bins in silo plants. These silos come in capacities ranging from 25 MT to 500 MT, with diameters varying from 2.72 m to 8.16 m and a height extending up to 10 rings.

While the standard hopper angle is set at 45 degrees, customisation is available based on specific capacity requirements. Designed with a single outlet at the bottom, NewTech Steels Hopper Silos simplify material venting and enable complete gravity discharge with minimal residue.

Key Advantages of Silos Storage

  • Requires lesser ground space compared to other grain storage options
  • Greater control on material inlet and outlet
  • Convenient loading and depositing
  • Reliable longevity with low maintenance
  • Fully mechanised handling with automation — reduces manpower and handling costs
  • Eliminates loss of quality and quantity due to rodents and insects
specifications:
TypeHopper Bottom (Conical base – single outlet)
MaterialGalvanised Steel Panels
Capacity Range25 MT to 500 MT
Diameter Range2.72 m to 8.16 m
HeightUp to 10 rings
Standard Hopper Angle45 degrees (customisable)
ApplicationsGrain, Seeds, Fertilizers, Feed, Buffer bins
DischargeComplete gravity discharge from bottom outlet
FoundationFlat or conical concrete foundation
ManufacturerNewTech Steels Industries Pvt. Ltd., Ghaziabad, U.P.

description:
Flat Bottom Silos — Advanced Large Capacity Storage

NewTech Steels takes pride in offering cutting-edge silo storage tanks that cater to both short-term and long-term storage needs. Our state-of-the-art silos serve as secure repositories for various materials, ranging from 25 MT to 12,500 MT in capacity, with diameters from 2.72 metres to 30 metres and heights up to 18 rings.

Flat Bottom Silos

Flat Bottom Silos, engineered using advanced technology, boast a flat bottom surface capable of enduring various material storage conditions. Recommended for grain storage exceeding 500 MT capacities, these silos come in sizes ranging from 1,000 MT to 12,500 MT, with diameters between 9 m to 30 m and heights reaching up to 18 rings.

The silo panels, corrugated in nature, are assembled cylindrically on circular purlins and vertical stiffeners, secured with bolts and nuts onto heavy concrete rings. These rings are situated on deep civil foundations constructed on-site to match the dimensions of the grain silos, ensuring stability and durability.

Why Choose NewTech Steels Flat Bottom Silos?

  • Expert Craftsmanship: Each tank undergoes rigorous quality checks to meet industry standards.
  • Robust Construction: Premium-grade steel built to withstand the test of time and harsh environmental conditions.
  • Customisation Options: Silos can be customised in terms of size, shape, and additional features.
  • Cutting-Edge Technology: State-of-the-art manufacturing facilities leveraging latest industry advancements.
specifications:
TypeFlat Bottom (Corrugated galvanised steel panels)
MaterialGalvanised Corrugated Steel
Capacity Range1,000 MT to 12,500 MT
Diameter Range9 m to 30 m
HeightUp to 18 rings
FoundationDeep concrete civil foundation, on-site constructed
AssemblyBolted panels on circular purlins and vertical stiffeners
ApplicationsGrain, Cement, Fertilizer, Bulk Materials
Recommended ForGrain storage exceeding 500 MT
ManufacturerNewTech Steels Industries Pvt. Ltd., Ghaziabad, U.P.

description:
Epoxy Coated Coloured Steel Tank

Epoxy coating is a durable, protective resin substance used to prevent carbon steel tanks from degradation on their surface. This coating of epoxy is an antifungal layer used on the outer surface of tanks with an inner lining of insulation.

Epoxy coated steel tanks are available in Blue and Green colours. This technology is used for both MS sheets as well as ZA sheets, which enhances the intrinsic properties of steel. Bare steel can easily corrode with different environmental conditions, but this epoxy coating process eliminates the chance of rusting, which increases the lifespan of the tank. There is a membrane bag fixed inside the tank shell to ensure secured storage of water.

Applications

NewTech Steels epoxy coated tanks can be used in several applications including:

  • Chemical storage
  • Wastewater treatment
  • Potable water storage
  • Raw water storage
  • Domestic supply systems

The Fusion Bond Epoxy coating process bonds the epoxy resin directly to the steel surface, providing superior corrosion resistance for demanding applications across Oil & Gas, ETP, WTP, and industrial sectors.
specifications:
Coating TypeFusion Bond Epoxy (FBE)
Base MaterialCarbon Steel (MS / ZA sheets)
Available ColoursBlue and Green
Inner LiningMembrane bag for secured water storage
Temperature RangeUp to 80°C continuous
ApplicationsChemicals, ETP, WTP, Potable Water, Raw Water, Oil & Gas
Anti-fungalYes – antifungal outer coating layer
Rust PreventionYes – eliminates chance of rusting
ManufacturerNewTech Steels Industries Pvt. Ltd., Ghaziabad, U.P.
